business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 CNA Financial premium $414,601.77 with 1 claim and no cancellations; 2023 Zurich Insurance Group premium $423,914.72 with 0 claims and no cancellations; 2022 American International Group premium $447,842.42 with 1 claim and no cancellations.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Hours of operation: Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM. Years in business: 24. Years with current management: 18. Employees: 145 full-time and 28 part-time. Annual revenue / gross receipts: $67,000,000.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Do you have a formal safety program? No. Do you have written contracts with all subcontractors? Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Short-term rentals permitted: No. EV charging stations installed: Yes. Occupied vs. vacant: 95%. Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. OSHA citations in the past 3 years: No.

concerns: Commercial occupancy exists within the buildings.
EV charging stations are installed on the premises.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
Prior insurance history shows 1 claim in 2024 and 1 claim in 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history lists 1 claim in 2024 with CNA Financial, 0 claims in 2023 with Zurich Insurance Group, and 1 claim in 2022 with American International Group; no cancellations are reported for 2022, 2023, or 2024.
positives: 24 years in business and 18 years with current management.
Written contracts with all subcontractors and indemnification required from all contractors.
All listed premises are sprinklered, and the building is fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
24-hour doorperson or security is provided on premises.
Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are not permitted.
Plumbing, HVAC, and electrical systems have been updated, with electrical updated in 2023.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years.
No cancellations reported in the prior insurance history.
